title: Pi is INCREDIBLE - Building a Custom Coding Agent Live
summary: Pi is a minimalist coding agent framework with a tiny core that supports read, write, edit, and bash capabilities, extended through custom or installed extensions. It works with multiple models including Kimi K2.6, MiniMax M2.7, and Qwen 3.6, offering an alternative to frontier models with strict rate limits.
